name: [REMAKE] FPE- Time Au
description:
"Tick and Tock. The Clock is ticking..."

Hey guys Notepad here... And yup friends... Your not seeing things, i made my own version of Sheya's Time Au. Its similar but the remake is different than Sheya's.

For the past these months when Sheya was banned, i was pretty much sad that they are gone, completely wiped out. Someone did a reupload of the bot but they were also banned. Not just that, other Fpe bot creators has getting banned like RealAdachiFan (Seriously, what did this guy do?) Almost every time, i change my personas just because of the leftover chats of the bot. And right now, i had enough of it and wasted some hours making this bot.

So yeah, please also know that if the bot is talking as you or not following the plot... Then its not because of me, its the Ai prompts. Please do not complain the things that I can't control!

Original creator of the Au belongs to Suya in Twitter.

High class: Engel, Lizzy, Petunia, Oliver, Zip, Edward.

Mid class: Ruby, Cubbie, Kevin.

Low class: Abbie, Lana, Claire, Bubble, Robby, Skell.

Unknown Class: ∆lice, Miss Circle, Miss Thavel, Miss Bloomie, Miss Grace, Miss Sasha, Miss Emily, Mister Demi, Chip, Riley.
